loop1.title: PQ Issues KPI Strip (Total Issues / I-THD Events / V-THD Events / PF Gap Feeders / Neutral Stress / Worst I-THD / Worst V-THD)
loop1.note: Showing panel-level PQ issue counts and worst-case metrics aggregated from active feeders; some feeders are dark (no data) and honest-blank their slots.

loop1.title: Harmonics & PQ Timeline
loop1.note: Showing power quality event timelines for active feeders; some members (e.g., Solar Incomers, Curing Line) are dark and will render blank.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing I-THD and V-THD for the first 3 active feeders; voltage THD columns (thd_voltage_*) have no data on this meter and are honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Feeder PQ At {period}
loop1.note: Showing THD and power quality for feeders with active data (has_data=Y). Feeders with has_data=N are omitted from the roster.

loop1.title: Signature
loop1.note: Showing harmonic signature (THD) and power metrics for active feeders; 3rd harmonic, k-factor, and voltage THD columns are not logged on this meter's member tables, so those spokes render as blanks.
